message.content:
Quotes: Add an edit button to each saved quote that allows the user to edit the quote text, page number, and tags after it's been entered.
Emojis: Add a 📚 emoji to book entries, 📰 to articles, and 🎙️ to podcasts everywhere they appear in the app.
Completed section: Consolidate all completed items under a single 'Completed Media' heading. Show the 2 most recent of each type (books, articles, podcasts) — so up to 6 items total, grouped with their emoji as the differentiator. Below them all, add a 'View All' button that opens a full directory page showing all completed works broken into three sections: Books, Articles, and Podcasts, each under their own heading.
Push to GitHub when done."

1→export type BookStatus = 'active' | 'completed' | 'paused' | 'queued'
     2→export type BookType = 'book' | 'article' | 'podcast'
     3→export type NoteTab = 'outline' | 'scratch'
     4→
     5→export interface Book {
     6→  id: string
     7→  title: string
     8→  type: BookType
     9→  author: string | null
    10→  // Book-specific
    11→  current_page: number | null
    12→  total_pages: number | null
    13→  // Article-specific
    14→  publication: string | null
    15→  article_date: string | null

export type BookStatus = 'active' | 'completed' | 'paused' | 'queued'
export type BookType = 'book' | 'article' | 'podcast'
export type NoteTab = 'outline' | 'scratch'

export interface Book {
  id: string
  title: string
  type: BookType
  author: string | null
  // Book-specific
  current_page: number | null
  total_pages: number | null
  // Article-specific
  publication: string | null
  article_date: string | null
  // Podcast-specific
  show_title: string | null
  guests: string | null
  air_date: string | null
  // Common
  sessions_per_week: number | null
  sort_order: number | null
  status: BookStatus
  date_finished: string | null // YYYY-MM-DD
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface BookNote {
  id: string
  book_id: string
  tab: NoteTab
  content: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface Quote {
  id: string
  book_id: string
  quote_text: string
  page_number: number | null
  tags: string[]
  heading_id: string | null
  sort_order: number | null
  created_at: string
}

export interface Connection {
  id: string
  source_type: 'quote' | 'note'
  source_id: string
  target_type: 'quote' | 'note'
  target_id: string
  note: string | null
  created_at: string
  // joined
  target_book?: Book
  target_quote?: Quote
  target_note?: BookNote
}

// Search result types
export type SearchResultType = 'quote' | 'note'

export interface SearchResult {
  type: SearchResultType
  id: string
  bookId: string
  bookTitle: string
  content: string
  tags?: string[]
  pageNumber?: number | null
  tab?: NoteTab
}
